name: Legal Contract Clause Review Assistant
description: A contract review co-worker for clause intake and attorney review. Put contracts, text exports, playbook notes, or clause annotations in the input folder; it extracts key clauses, maps them to the configured taxonomy, compares them with the playbook, flags issues and evidence gaps, and writes a source-grounded review packet to the output folder.

document_folder.description: Local folder containing Commercial contract PDFs, TXT, CSV, JSON, and clause annotations.

output_folder.description: Local folder where review packets should be written.

field_profile.description: Field names or extraction profile for this workflow.

public_dataset.description: Public dataset selected as the sample input source.

example.name: Contract Understanding Atticus Dataset (CUAD) v1
example.provider: The Atticus Project on Zenodo and Hugging Face
example.availability_note: Public dataset with 510 commercial contracts and 13,000+ labels across 41 clause types.
example.download_hint: Download CUAD_v1.zip from Zenodo or use the Hugging Face dataset for text-oriented experiments.

input_folder.description: Default local input folder for sample files or user-provided files.

contract.summary: Law firms, in-house legal teams, CLM vendors, and diligence teams need private extraction of privileged or deal-sensitive contract terms without uploading client agreements to external services.
users: Law firms, in-house legal teams, CLM vendors, M&A diligence teams, and contract operations groups.

dataset_input.name: Contract Understanding Atticus Dataset (CUAD) v1
dataset_input.provider: The Atticus Project on Zenodo and Hugging Face
dataset_input.availability_note: Public dataset with 510 commercial contracts and 13,000+ labels across 41 clause types.
dataset_input.download_hint: Download CUAD_v1.zip from Zenodo or use the Hugging Face dataset for text-oriented experiments.

steps.label: Stage Contract Inputs
steps.goal: Resolve the contract folder and CUAD sample input notes.

steps.label: Extract Contract Text
steps.goal: Read embedded text and call shared llm_ocr_skill only for scanned or low-text contract pages.

steps.label: Extract Clause Matrix
steps.goal: Extract governing law, assignment, indemnity, termination, renewal, exclusivity, and liability evidence.

steps.label: Compare Contract Playbook
steps.goal: Compare extracted clauses against the supplied playbook and flag gaps or negotiation risks.

steps.label: Write Clause Review Packet
steps.goal: Write a review-only contract clause packet with source excerpts and attorney review questions.

human.reason: Human approval is required before any downstream release, filing, payment, legal, clinical, credit, or system-sync action.

rules.message: Human approval is required before extracted values are released to downstream systems or used for consequential decisions.

metadata.name: Legal Contract Clause Review Assistant
metadata.description: A contract review co-worker for clause intake and attorney review. Put contracts, text exports, playbook notes, or clause annotations in the input folder; it extracts key clauses, maps them to the configured taxonomy, compares them with the playbook, flags issues and evidence gaps, and writes a source-grounded review packet to the output folder.
metadata.agent_role: Local contract review team that extracts clause evidence and keeps legal conclusions review-only.
metadata.target_users: Law firms, in-house legal teams, CLM vendors, M&A diligence teams, and contract operations groups.
metadata.customizable_for: M&A diligence, commercial contract review, CLM intake, renewal review, assignment and change-of-control checks, and playbook comparison.
metadata.problem: Law firms, in-house legal teams, CLM vendors, and diligence teams need private extraction of privileged or deal-sensitive contract terms without uploading client agreements to external services.

input_contract.description: Law firms, in-house legal teams, CLM vendors, and diligence teams need private extraction of privileged or deal-sensitive contract terms without uploading client agreements to external services.

required_inputs.description: Local folder containing Commercial contract PDFs, TXT, CSV, JSON, and clause annotations.

required_inputs.name: output_folder
required_inputs.description: Local folder where review packets should be written.

required_inputs.name: field_profile
required_inputs.description: Structured field names or extraction profile for this document workflow.

optional_inputs.description: Downloadable public dataset reference used for sample input selection.

optional_inputs.description: Human review and confidence thresholds for final packet release.

optional_inputs.description: Default local input folder for sample files or user-provided files.
